title: Broooooo
author: by aprettyboy
summary: Kiri goes to a party, meets a drunken friend, and said drunken friend gives him his number, which was actually a random number from his contacts.

story_chapters.title: Chapter 1: Oops
paragraphs: Kiri: Hey kuro bro! It was cool meeting you yesterday!
kurobro: First of all, my name is bakugou, and who the fuck are you
Kiri: ohhhh was it bakugou? You were so wasted man, I doubt you remember my name too haha.
What the fuck.How does he not get it? Bakugou walked to class as he dealt with his random and annoying stranger.
Bakubro: I neither got wasted yesterday nor know who Kuro is
Kiri: wait
Kiri: oh wait fuck
Kiri: was I too drunk I typed the wrong number?
What the actual fuck.If it wasn’t so early in the morning he would type in all caps but it was way too fucking early.
Bakubro: how the fuck would I know I about your personal life
Kiri: OMG I TOTALLY WAS. AND THIS IS THE WRONG NUMBER.
Baku: good job idiot, now stop texting me.
Kiri: I WILL I MEAN THIS I S KINDA FUNNY RIGHT?
At this point, Bakugou wanted to turn his entire phone off. Just what did he do to deserve such a disturbance this morning. Should he respond? Maybe not, but his phone buzzed again,
Kiri: I just told my friend, hes laughing his ass off of
Bakubro: WHY WOULD I CARE
Kiri: oh
Kiri: Im probably interrupting you huh? Sorry sorry
Bakubro: I mean I was on my way to class hoping I would have a peaceful morning until you texted me
Kiri: ….harsh. Just harsh. WAIT. CLASS? U.A University?
Baku: if I ever see you on campus I’ll kill you.
Kiri: duly noted bakubro.
Baku: Im not your bro. You messaged me. Im leaving. Dont talk to me. Like. ever again.
Kiri: oh? To class? Talk to you later!

God, oh god. Bakugou shoved his phone into his pocket. Great, he was going to class mad.(youre always mad)“Talk to you later”. Whoever he was talking to must be crazy to message a random number and become “bros with him.” andWhoeverhe was, he wanted absolutely nothing to do with him. How did the little shit even get his number? “fuck”,he muttered as he checked the time, he was about to be late to class.

“Bro! How could you text the wrong the number?”, Sero said, finally finishing laughing at Kiri’s dumb mistake. Kiri grabbed a pillow and chucked it at Sero. “For your info, Sero,hes a cool guy”, Kiri said as he crossed his arms. Sero blinked,”Are you stupid or really stupid? He clearly wasn’t interested.”

“He probably woke up on the wrong side of the bed.”, Kiri countered. “Do the words ‘im gonna kill you’ not mean anything to you?? Hes a complete stranger. Actually, who am I even kidding, I mean the only reason we’re friends is because you came up to me in kindergarten for a straight month asking to be my friend. When Mina was new in middle school, you insisted on bringing her into our group because 'we need a girl in the squad', and Kami, poor Kami, in highschool you showed up at his house to give him notes and somehow became friends with his mom who assumed you guys were friends and he was forced to join us because your mom thought you were sooooo sweet, basically,  I might as well be talking to a rock at this point.”

Kiri,”Rocks are cool! I love them. Thanks bro” Sero sighed,”How on earth did you get interested into rocks..you come from a family of doctors and athletes...and you chose rocks. Thats it. You must have been a rock in your past life.”

Kiri put his hands under his chin,”I do have dreams like that…” Sero groaned and planted his face into his pillow,”just let me insult you and have you be insulted for once. I want a new friend.” Kiri chuckled,”not happening sero,” to which Sero loudly groaned again.
“Im gonna text him again”, Kiri said. “Dude its been like five minutes he’s probably in class and he most likely blocked your number at this point,” Sero commented.

“Theres something about this guy that’s telling me to befriend him," Kiri said. "does your brain only hear what it wants to hear?? give the guy a-" "hey Sero do you want to know the many different tyes of r-" "ANYTHING but that, go, do whatever you want to do, just please, dont talk about rocks.", Sero pleaded. Kiri gave him a thumbs up,"why of quartz!" Sero rolled his eyes. Yet another pun. "Im going to ask Bakubro what he thinks of rocks", Kiri said as he typed on his phone.
Sero fake sniffled and wiped a tear, “God the poor guy, may the gods be with him.” For he knew, one truly hit rock bottom, when Kiri had his eyes set on them.

paragraphs: Bakugou could barely pay attention for the first half of class, trying to think of how that annoying stranger could have gotten his phone number. However, all of the people he knew were most definitely not connected to the party scene to get drunk, so who the fuck was it? Bakugou’s brows only furrowed more and he clenched his teeth. This was going to bother him to no end, he didn’t even know a kuro.
Bakugou whipped out his phone again only to find out that the weirdo texted him.

Once class ended, Bakugou walked out, his hands in his pockets. It was his only class that day, he just wanted to go home and rest. As he neared home, his phone buzzed in his pocket again.

“Hehehe, Bakugou is so funny”, Kiri said as he reread their messages. Sero set his phone down on his stomach “dude, the guy was insulting you, just what could you possibly see in him?”

Kiri looked at Sero and shrugged his shoulders,”I dont know, I mean, its like rocks, normal people would hate learning about it, but I can see the beauty, fun, and entertainment of it all. Thats what I see in him.”
“Wow..that was kinda inspirational Kiri...but you also compared him to a rock. ”, Sero commented. Kiri smiled, “I try, thank you. What do I do, he said he was sleeping..”

“Isnt the friendly thing to do is let him sleep?” Kiri sighed,”yea..thats right.” “hey Kiri, you wanna play..hero academia?”, Sero said as he wiggled his eyebrows and his finger pointed to the TV with the playstation setup in their room. Kiri’s eyes sparkled,”broooo” Sero nodded his head,”Bro.”

Hero Academia was the new popular mmorpg game where you could create your own character. The styles were endless and you could even add customized skins to be unique from others. Kiri’s herosona was Red Riot,  a man who hardens. Sero’s herosona, Cellophane, who can shoot tape out of his arms.
Unfortunately their quirks couldn’t be customized, but their names could.

About two hours later, Kiri’s stomach grumbled. “Woah, how long have we been playing?”, Kiri asked. Sero clicked on his phone,”shit, almost two hours, time really does fly by on here. Pizza?” Kiri smiled,”you read my mind!”

It was hard for him to keep friends. Mostly his fault, he’d rather stay holed up than socialize.  Was it really him or was it them? Maybe he just hadn’t met the right people. Whatever it was, his consensus, at the moment, was that Kiri, was not the right person.

story_chapters.title: Chapter 4: Day 3
paragraphs: Bakugou had to wake up early the next day for work. He clicked on his phone and saw the time. He worked in a starbucks near the campus but he only made the coffee. It was a drag for him to smile at every customer but he made some damn good coffee and business upped a little when he came. The manager had no choice but to keep him on.
He got into his uniform. Work started at 10 am but he always got up at 9.
As soon as he got dressed up and ready, he still had 30 minutes left. He took his time to walk to starbucks but he still arrived ten minutes early. When he opened the door, Deku was there as well.

“Oh, Hi Kacchan!”, Deku said and smiled. “You’re here early”, Bakugou said as he walked behind the counter. “So are you”, Deku said. “Shut it nerd”, Bakugou said immediately after. Deku only chuckled, already used to Bakugou’s behavior.

Once Bakugou clocked in, he started his normal routine for the day. A couple hours passed by and it was soon time for his break. He never looked at his phone during break but he instinctively found himself taking it out, but quickly putting it back in. “Like a give a hell if he texts me”, he’d mutter under his breath everytime it happened.
So, once it came time for a break, he’d figured it was appropriate to check his phone. Long Behold, there was a text.

Kirishima woke up at 7 am. He was in a community service club(hestoo precious pls) and they were holding their bi-annual “leave your kid for a day” event. Parents could leave their kids from 9 am to 10 Pm as they relaxed and had their little day off. He wasn’t getting paid but it was kids and he was giving the parents a break. Kirishima was sure he would love it.
He got ready, wearing his least favorite clothing because lord knows what could happen spending the whole day with children. He looked at his clock, 7:30. The bus was to leave at 8 am.
Kirishima: its kinda early, youre probably sleeping, but morning!!

“Kiri, over here!”, a green-haired boy waved. “Ah, Deku, what’s up bro!”, Kiri said as he rushed and hit Deku’s back. Deku coughed,”too rough again Kiri” Kiri laughed,”sorry I forgot”
“Kirishimaaaaaa”, a girly voice called. He turned around and saw Mina,”ah, catch you later Deku!”

He ran over to Mina,”hey! Hows it going?” “great great, hows it going with baku..uh..whatever his name is?”, Mina asked. Kiri’s smile got bigger,”good! I think hes warming up to me, I’m sure I’ll have him by the end of the week.” Mina crossed her arms,”hmmm, he seems stubborn, I don’t know, but if you trust him, so will I.”
Soon it came time to go on the bus. Kiri sat next to Mina and the two conversed until they hit the daycare the event was being held at. By that time, it was already 9 am.

“Kirishima Eijirou”, he said as he signed in. “Kirishima...Kiri-ah! Lucky for you, you’ll have twins, Eri and Erin”, the lady said. “Right this way”, the lady said and started to walk. Kirishima smiled, anyone else would probably not like the idea but he was sure it was going to be great.

Eri had long, curly, brown hair, while Erin had short black hair. Kirishima bent down and smiled,”just call me Kiri”, he said and held out his hand.

It was hard for anyone to resist Kiri’s bright smile and soon the two stepped out in front of him. The girl, Eri, shook his hand,”h-hewwo, um kiwi”, and took his hand. “Eri you’re very pretty”, he said. The lady chuckled,”Im sure you’ll have no problem with them, good luck.”
And she wasn’t wrong.

Erin had a sword,”Give me back my sister!”, he said and charged as he hit Kiri’s legs with his sword. Kiri fell, gently letting Eri, on the floor. “Oh my god..oh no..you got me..AHHHHH”, he said as the two jumped on him and he was presumed “Dead”.

story_chapters.title: Chapter 6: Day 5
paragraphs: Bakugou woke up as his alarm went off, slamming the snooze button, only to be annoyed be it 5 minutes later. “Youre about as annoying as that shitty red head”, Bakugou said as he rose from his bed like a vampire in a coffin. He had to work the earlier morning shift because for some reason Wednesday was the day people desperately needed coffee in the morning, specifically,hiscoffee. So here he was, at 6 am, getting ready for work.

He walked into the coffee shop as he drunk the last bit of the coffee he made at home,”sup nerd”, he said as he walked through the counter. “Good morning Bakugou”,Deku said and smiled as he waved. “How are you?”, Deku asked as Bakugou set up for opening. “I got up at 6 am what the hell do you think”, Bakugou responded. Deku chuckled,”I had to ask” “And that guy is as annoying as ever”,he said.

“Oh, you mean the one that wants to be your friend?”, Deku. “I hate him, hes so stupid, with his stupid red hair that I bet looks stupid in the first place he probably looks like some stupid stop sign or something”, Bakugou said and let out an angry burst of air as he tied his apron around himself.

Deku was shocked as Bakugou ranted..he didn’t actually expect much from the how are you but here he was. Now Deku was really curious to who this guy to make even the cold-hearted Bakugou eager to confide in someone with the emotions he was feeling.
“Does this guy have a name??”, Deku asked. Bakugou was about to walk in the back room but stopped,”kiri shitty shima or something”
“wait...Kirishima red hair geologist major?”, Deku asked.
Bakugou turned around and glared at Deku,”are you telling me you know that bastard? And you didn’t tell me?”
Deku raised his hands in defense,”technically you have been only calling him by nicknames but he always comes here because he likes your coffee”

“What?”, Bakugou growled. Deku put his hands down and spoke,”I would have told you but hes a regular and im sure if I told you that a customer always complimented your coffee you’d say something self-arrogant like you already know that you make coffee good and tell me to fuck off.”

Bakugou scoffed,”well, I DO. theres no need to state the obvious.” “do you want to know what he says?”, Deku questioned. “No I dont care”, Bakugou said, even though he was curious as to what someone that annoying had to say about his coffee. He started to walk away until he heard Deku speak,”Kiri only comes in when youre here because he likes your coffee the best and he always tells me to tell you that he loves your coffee because I said you were too shy to be told in person”

Bakugou grit his teeth,”I said I dont care”, and kicked the door into the back room. He talked angrily as he setup the supplies,”just what type of idiot, how have I not seen him before, well Im back here but-wait-who the fuck is he- I should have recognized that assholes name-DEKU”(Baku hunthat's the opposite of not caring).

Deku opened the door,”yea?” “What is his name on the cup?”, Bakugou asked. “Oh, well he uses his first name, Eijirou but I just say Eiji”  Bakugou’s eyes opened wide,”hes the caramel latte with extra caramel, and two shots of vanilla creamer?” Since they were close to the college campus, Bakugou had begun to recognize orders, and Eiji was one of them.

Of course, he thought nothing of it as the others, just some name connected to a specific type of coffee, until now. “So what you’re saying that hes gonna come again?”, Bakugou asked. Deku held out his phone,”he always texts me to see if you’re here and if not he doesnt come because he says he likes Kacchan’s coffee the best, he even came in once when you werent working and ordered the same thing but it wasnt the same to him you know?”
”whatever I dont care I’ll spit in his drink, thats it, leave nerd”, Bakugou said as he turned away and continued to prepare.

“Please respect the customers Bakugou”, Deku responded and then thought to himself.Then why did you ask? And why are your cheeks kinda red? He would have commented but he cherished his life way too much. ”Im opening in 5 minutes, Kiri said He’ll come around at 8:30”
“DONT CARE”, Bakugou yelled at Deku like a rebellious teenager as he walked out.
Bakugou turned his head,”How many fucking times do I have to say I dont care.” Like hell he would. The shitty hair can just take his coffee and go.

Bakugoustood out the door as he, yet again, heard these idiots topic of conversation. It’s like they had nothing better to do with their lives than try and figure out his. Of course, none of the rumors were true, but he didn’t want to associate with idiots who were dumb enough to believe a guy could do all that and manage to have the top grades in the class.
They excused it with him having “witch powers” which were beyond his comprehension. Not only did he not need friends, he definitely did NOT need idiots as friends.

Bakugou was in a dream-like state and because of recent events, this is what his mind decided to play in his head. He still lay there, peacefully, with his eyes closed, his stomach rising up and down slowly until his dream suddenly switched up.

Bakugou was face forward in front of Kirishima, his face twisted, a senile smile on his face. “You thought I actually wanted to be your friend? How pitiful!”, an angry voice sprung from Kirishima’s mouth, making the usually firm and tough Bakugou step back at a bit of fear.

At this point, his eyes started to twitch a little and his hands formed fists while he slept. In dreams, one was never in control, and, whether one denied it or not, dreams showed your deepest, darkest fears, or revealed things you didn’t even realize yourself.

Say something Bakugou, his true self thought but he wasn’t in control of his body. He just stood there, frozen in fear as Kirishima laughed in his face,”I never wanted to be your friend but its nice to see you squirm” Finally, his mouth opened,”I’ll fucking kill YOU- YOU-”
Bakugou arose from his sleep, sweat on his face, and frantic breathing. “What the hell”, he said as he recalled the dream.
He wiped the sweat off his forehead as he looked down and recalled the dream. Just what exactly was it supposed to mean? Maybe it was his body telling him that Kirishima was no good for him.
“Ugh fuck”, he said as he opened google. He clicked the first result and read the article

“Dreams often show what one fears the most. For example, If you see your father yelling at you about your schoolwork. It is seen as the fear one gets when they do not want to disappoint your parents. Its the last thing you would ever want in the world and it manifested in your dreams.”

Bakugou stopped reading as he thought of his dream again. So...Losing Kirishima was what he feared the most?? Bakugou put his hands on his head and started to grab at his hairs. God, he hated these feelings so much. If he could bury them, he would. Just how did he let that guy mess him up so much?

His phone buzzed and Bakugou jumped because he was so focused on his thoughts. “Who the fuck”, he said as he went to pick up his phone and wondered why he even questioned who it was as he looked at his phone. Him. who else could it be?

Once he logged in, he immediately saw that he had a friend request from Bakugou. However, instead of being scared, he smiled. “Technically we’re friends in the game now Bakugou”, he said and laughed as if Bakugou could actually hear him.

The door opened and Sero came in with a bag of popcorn,”Kirishima I’m ready to see you die” Kirishima closed his eyes and sighed,”do you not trust I cant beat him, even just a little bit?” Sero sat down next to him,”I never underestimate people who have a grudge to settle, theyre always the most powerful.”
The game made a noise and Kirishima looked to see “battle request from Explurder” Kirishima gulped.”oh boy, here we go.” He clicked accept and the game went black as it loaded the battlefield.

Sero’s eyes were glued to screen,already eating the popcorn as it loaded. The game loaded and Kirishima was face to face with Bakugou’s character. Now that he looked at it, the character really did look like him.
“Fight, Start!”

The game had started and Kirishima quickly activated his quirk. Bakugou, however, proved relentless. He lunged forward and kept attacking Kirishima with his explosives, bringing down his defense levels, which also made his hardening weaker so that players could actually hurt him.

Sero laughed,”dude, hes not even letting you get a hit, you might as well just call this murder now!” Bakugou, was punching, hitting, throwing his explosives, everything at Kirishima until Kirishima’s health went down and he was viewed the winner.

Bakugou’s character on the screen laughed and pointed at the defeated Kiri as the words “You lose” appeared on Kirishima’s screen. Kirishima dropped the controller out his hands, his mouth open in shock. Seconds later, his phone buzzed
Bakugou: Ha! I beat you! How does it feel?
Bakugou: do you feel hurt huh? I fucking murdered you
Bakugou: looks like your rocks couldn’t help you this time, you truly hit rock bottom you nerd

Kirishima stared at the texts and the look of horror on his face was quickly replaced by a happy one as he fell back laughing, grabbing his stomach,”Oh my god, he sounds so happy he beated me, I cant even be mad!”, he said and continued to laugh some more.
Kirishima wondered if he should just give in to his ego for once, so he did.
Kiri: DUDE you didnt even let me get a hit in : (
Bakugou: thats cause you just suck lol
Kiri: I guess I do suck huh?
Bakugou: YES, glad youre starting to realize it
Kirishima put his hand over his mouth,”pfft, Sero, im just feeding into his pride, and he changes so quickly, aha, hes so stupid, I love him-eh”

“Did you just-”, Sero tried to say but Kirishima interrupted him,”I meant as a friend!” Sero smirked,”then why are you getting so defensive?” “What? Because I knew you would get the wrong idea”, Kirishma said. “Its only been a week and youre bringing out the “I love you” okay Kirishima, keep lying to yourself. I have to go do something with Kaminari, so have fun playing with your boyfriend,” Sero said and stood up.
“Hes not my boyfriend!” Kirishima said as he picked up his phone to reply.
Kiri: soooo, you wanna play together?
Bakugou: I just want to kill you
Kiri: you can kill me one more time and then we go play together?
Bakugou: youre dead
Kiri: kay, just gonna take that as a yes.

Bakugou tapped his buttons as he beat off a dragon with Kirishima,”Take that you fire breathing bastard!”, he said as he delivered the last blow to the lions head. “Heh”m Bakugou said with a smile as he watched the two characters rejoice with each other.

Him and Kirishima had been going at it for a while, he almost lost track of time, until his daily workout alarm started to ring. “Shit, its been that long?”, he asked as he picked it up and shut it off. Now looking outside, he realized it was pitch black.
Baku: I need to go do work
FriendhimShima: I probably should too...ttyl!
Baku: whatever

Bakugou got up and started to stretch himself. Tomorrow was the day he would meet Kirishima and as soon as he thought of that, doubts started to feel his mind, especially remembering the dream from last night. Kirishima had never even seen him, what if his face scared him off?
“Ugh”, he stopped stressing and went to do some pushups and as he muttered to himself. “Why do I care,one, what that shitty bastard, two, thinks of me, three”

He did twenty before he stopped. Bakugou exercised until he tired himself and he now lay on his bed, an hour later, looking at the ceiling as he tried to steady his breath. He spent about another hour taking a shower and getting another cup of ramen to eat.
Kirishima didn’t text him again until he was in his bed, getting ready for sleep, or, saying youre going to sleep when you know you’ll just be on your phone for another two hours.
FriendhimShima: Are you excited for tom?? Im not necessarily excited about you killing me but hey at least I get to be killed by a cool face!
Baku- you havent even seen my face idiot
FriendhimShima: but you’re cool
Baku: whatever
Bakugou continued to watch videos on his phone and text Kirishima until he finally became tired and could barely keep his eyelids open. It hit Kirishima as well.
FriedndhimShima: I’ll try to sleep even though I dont know if I can its like when youre a kid and you know youre going to disneyland and you dont want to sleep because its sooooo close
Baku: Go to sleep idiot
FriendhimShima: you got it dude, goodnight, punch those bedbugs if they bite!
Baku: yea yea night shitty hair

story_chapters.title: Chapter 8: Day 7
paragraphs: *beep beep beep*

A hand smashed the phone, the finger tapping a couple times before it finally stopped. Kiri lifted his head up a little and took in his surroundings. His brain slowly turned on as he laid down his on head and looked at Sero sleeping. About 2 minutes later it clicked in his head that today was the day. THE day. Kirishima lifted his body up and grabbed the phone, looking at the time. It was still early in the morning. Kirishima smiled. It wasfinallyhappening. He was so happy even though it could also be the last breaths he took on Earth.

He realized that his heart was pumping a little too fast and placed his hand on his heart to check. Was he that nervous? He did hope that everything would go well and Bakugou would at least give him a chance at being his friend. Then again, he knew in his heart that he would keep trying should that happen. Kirishima checked the time on his phone again and then opened it.
Kiri: Morninggggggg! :D Today is gonna rock!

They had agreed to meet up at 1 pm since Kirishima’s class ended at 12:15 pm. Kirishima closed his phone and got ready for class. As he was dressed and brushing his teeth, his phone buzzed in his backpocket. He pulled it out with his right hand and saw a message from Bakugou.
Bakugou: Nah I think im gonna cancel
Kiri: WAIT WHAT
Bakugou: chill, its a joke idiot
Kiri: YOU SUCK BAKUGOU! My heart stopped for a sec you know : ( I could have kicked the rocks!
Bakugou: maybe you should stop making those lame rock puns
Kiri: my last words will be about rocks
Bakugou: the day I breath once again

Kirishima rolled his eyes and put down his phone as he spit everything out into the sink and cleaned the inside of his mouth. Bakugou could play tough guy all he want but Kirishima knew some part of him had gotten attached to Kirishima. Why would he do all this?? Why would he continue to talk Kirishima? He could have ignored it….maybe Kirishima thought a little bit too much as he went to sleep last night.
Once he wiped his mouth, he grabbed his phone again and sent a message.
Kiri: are you ready to see my handsome face? Girls faint at the sight of it
Bakugou: No im sure they faint because they cant handle how ugly you are
Kiri: GaSP : O....YOU’LL SEE
Bakugou read over the text and chuckled. “Already did, idiot.” He was lying on his back, his phone in the air as he was typing out a message.
Baku: I’ll bring sunglasses just incase youre too ugly
FriendhimShima: I’ll have you know geologists know how to take care to stuff, even their face
Baku: is your face a rock?
FriendhimShima: My parents said they called me that because everytime I fell on my head I wouldn’t cry
Baku: So that explains why youre like this
FriendhimShima: like what
Baku: annoying and stupid

FriendhimShima: hmmmm, maybe I did lose a few screws, but hey, its always the weird people that accomplish things! Maybe its because Albert Einstein or Leonardo Da Vinci had loose screws that they were able to think of things no one else could
Baku: your optimism scares me sometimes
FriendhimShima: You?? The almighty Bakugou?? Scared? Lol! I gotta go head to class soooo, I guess the next time we talk will be face to face?
Baku: die

Bakugou put his phone down and turned to his side, closing his eyes. He tried to go to sleep but his eyes only opened seconds later. He looked at the clock and it was only about four hours till he was supposed to meet up with Kirishima.
“Ugh”, he said and stood up, scratching his head. He got off the the bed and yawned as he scratched his stomach.
After showering, washing up, and doing his daily exercise, Bakugou still had 2 more hours to spare. Suddenly, his phone buzzed.
FriendhimShima: Okay, I lied, but SAVE ME, this professor is so boring I dont think I can take a hour of this
Baku: No thanks
FriendhimShima: think of this as practice for your future job
Baku: you’re not dying
FriendhimShima: the professor is threatening me with all these hard equations
Baku: well does he have a gun to your head
FriendhimShima: metaphorically, its a hard rock life man
Baku: goodbye
FriendhimShima: WAIT JUST ONE QUICK THING
Baku: what
FriendhimShima: nothing I just wanted you to stay
Baku: PAY ATTENTION IN CLASS IDIOT

Bakugou shut off his phone, placing it on his bed as he rubbed his temples. He sat on the on bed and thought to himself.  Was this really the person he was going to meet soon? He was going to meet him, face to face. Bakugou wondered if he was taller or not, would he have to look down, or were the same height?

Bakugou shook his head and ignored his beating heart. Why would any of those things matter to him? “Ughhh”, Bakugou groaned outloud and let his body fallback, now staring up at the ceiling. Was he going to let that idiot be apart of his life, or was he way better off without him? Well, if he was even more annoying in real life, Bakugou would call it quits. He knew that much.

He chuckled to himself and smiled. Could he even handle his stupid puns up close, from his mouth? As soon as Bakugou realized he was smiling, he smacked his cheeks with both hands. “Disgusting”, he said as he thought of the previous action he was doing.

Kirishima sighed in class, his hand on his cheek as the professor’s words went in through one ear and right out the other. How could he even concentrate when all he could think about was what was going to happen after his class ended.
He decided to give Bakugou a break and scrolled down his social media feed in hopes it would make the time go by a little faster.

Since he was in the back, he slipped on one earphone to watch a video on his feed. The video was a dog who had a toy who would growl each time the owner hands went close to it and go back to a normal puppy face once the hand was away.

Kirishima silently laughed as he compared the dog to Bakugou. It was cute. He went to Youtube and spent the rest of the time on class watching videos of dogs doing funny stuff. As soon as it came time to leave, Kirishima packed up his stuff and headed out to the restroom.

He looked at himself in the mirror and took a deep breath. His hair was down today because he was too lazy to style it but he combed it straight through. He was also wearing casual clothing: just a regular white short, blue jeans rolled up towards the end, and red converse.
Now that the time was nearing close, his heart was beating faster than ever.

Bakugou stood in front of the mirror as he put on a leather jacket. He was wearing a skull shirt with black jeans and his black combat boots. The time on the phone was 12 pm and he had an hour to be at the designated place.

As he walked towards the door he opened and stopped. His body stopped him from walking further and his heart started to pound again. He clenched at it and grit his teeth.Stop it you damn heart.  “I said stop!”, he shouted down at his heart, only to lookup and see a person actually stop. “Not you, sorry”, he said as he watched the person walk away as fast as they could. He sighed. Good one Bakugou. Good one.But,hey, at least his heart was calm.
Bakugou took a deep breath. in......and out,”hahhh”,he said as he let it out and stuffed his hands in his leather jacket.

Bakugou put on his determined face and started to walk towards the school. He took in all his surroundings as he walked, trying to get his mind off of thinking of things other than what would happen when they finally meetup. 15 minutes later he finally arrived on the campus. If he kept heading towards the place, he would probably be there early and he did not want to be the first one there.

He stopped at the coffee shop and opened the door to see Deku working. “Oh, hi Kacchan!”, Deku said and waved. “Usual”, Bakugou said. He walked towards the nearest table and kicked the chair out with his feet as he sat down, his hand still firm in his pockets.
Minutes later a cup of coffee was placed on the table. “Youre not usually in here, is something happening?”, Deku asked.

“You stalking me or something? I just felt like it”, Bakugou responded. “Are you meeting Kirishima?”, he asked. Bakugou glared at Deku,”so you are stalking me?” Deku put his hands up in defense,”ah no, he wanted some coffee today but I said you weren’t working. He said it was fine though because he was meeting someone special today, it was enough to keep him awake.”

Bakugou grabbed his coffee and stood up,”im leaving”, he said and walked out quickly.Special. Who says that? And why didhesay that? Like there was anything special about it. Bakugou took a sip of his coffee, his face warming up even though it was already warm after Deku’s comment. Before he knew it, he was nearing the place where they were supposed to meet and it was still thirty minutes before the time. Great. He had planned to wait it out at the coffee shop.

He sighed. Bakugou walked away a couple places away from it on a bench. He took his phone out his pocket and put on his earphones. His feet started to unconsciously tap as he tried to focus on the music playing, but all he could think about what was going to happen soon.

Kirishima walked towards the meeting place and he could feel his palms sweating the closer he got. There was 15 minutes left till the time and all the things he had decided he would say to Bakugou went further and further away from his mind. Talking was way way easier on the phone.

When he got a couple steps away from the meetup place, he kept turning around and around as he muttered,”you can do this”, “no you cant”, until the 5th and final time as he closed his eyes and walked towards the place, planting his feet down. His eyes were still closed and he stomped the ground,”there, no more moving Kirishima”
“You really are an idiot.”, Kirishima heard a voice say, opening his eyes, and screeching.
“ AHHH W-WHere did you come from uh?”, Kirishima frantically said as he froze in shock, staring at Bakugou.Holy shit he looks better up close.

Bakugou, who had his hands in his pockets looked away, a blush apparent on his cheeks.He must be a girl, he cant be this damn cute.“Ive been here idiot”, he said, only to look and see Kirishima still staring at him like he saw a ghost. “Is something wrong with your eyes?”, Bakugou commented.
Kirishima blinked and cleared his throat,”no uh, I just,wow, youre cool.”
Bakugou eyes went wide and he glared at Kirishima, despite the blush on his face,”D-dont you have anything better to say shitty hair!”
Kirishima looked at how mad he was and his smile went bigger and bigger until it turned to laughter.
“Whats so funny?”, Bakugou inquired trying to remove the thought in his mind that his laugh was kind of cute. Kirishima stop and smiled,”I figured this is how you would look angry”

Bakugou crossed his arms and turned his head away from Kirishima. To be quite frank, he realized that hes hardly ever had any social interaction and is at a loss on how to make a conversation or continue one. The only thing he could do was do what he did best, be on the defensive. "Shut it”, Bakugou responded.

Kirishima held out his hand in front of Bakugou,”so, friends?”, he asked. He saw Bakugou glance a look at him, only making him more nervous because Kirishima didn’t know what was going on in his head at the time.
“Im not touching your hand, who knows what dumb rocks you’ve touched all day”, Bakugou said.
“Sooo you would shake my hand, thats what youre saying?”, Kirishima asked, kind of confused.

Bakugou was screaming in his mind. Yes, YES, thats what he saying but his pride was way too high to say those words. During his time before the meeting, he thought again, about what he should do but the words of his mom and Deku kept screaming in his ear everytime he thought anything other than befriending Kirishima, the headaches only grew worse.
“Im SAYING im not shaking hands that may have germs on them, so there”, Bakugou said as he looked at Kirishima, only to turn away his glance yet again.

Kirishima blinked a couple times until it all clicked. He chuckled,”Bakugou, youre funny”, he said as he realized exactly what Bakugou was trying to say without actually saying it. He knew Bakugou was a man of few words, he should have figured this out sooner.
“So anyway-” Kirishima stopped as his stomach made a loud grumble,”uhhhh”, he started until Bakugou spoke,”you hungry or something?”

Kirishima closed his mouth and smiled,”you already want to eat together? This friendship is going along smoothly.” Bakugou turned his head towards Kirishima as his brows lowered, ”Hah? I just asked a question.”
Kirishima started to speak,“There’s a pizza place near here-” “I go to the same school as you idiot I know where the pizza place is”, Bakugou interrupted. Kirishima smiled,”oh, so you do want to go?”

“what? NO I was just stating a fact”, Bakugou said, even more upset than he was last time. Although, he really wouldn’t mind eating pizza but he wouldnt let Kirishima win this game(Bakugou friendship isn’t a game)

Bakugou brushed past Kirishima and spoke,”Im going to go get pizza.” Kirishima tilted his head, confused, as Bakugou started to walk forward,”you really are something, huh?” “WHAT was that?”, Bakugou shoutedas he turned around, his hand in a fist already. Kirishima laughed as he put his hands up in defense,”I meant can I come with you to get pizza haha” Bakugou huffed and turned around as he put his hand in his pocket,”I dont care, just dont be annoying.”
Kirishima chuckled, “Wait up”, he said as he jogged up to him. Once he did, he looked at Bakugou and spoke,”hey, I still forgot to tell you who gave me the number”

Bakugou stopped as his eyes twitched. How could he forget. The whole reason it was even started and heforgot.“Who”, Bakugou said through gritted teeth, his fists already balled up. “Well, funny story, Kuro and me were both drunk, I asked for his number he”, Kirishima air quoted,”found”, “his phone, but turns out he picked up Deku’s phone and-”

“Deku that bastard I’m going to kill him”, Bakugou said as he started to plot a murder in his mind. “WAIT, you know Deku?, it really is a small world after all huh? You wont really kill him though, right? I mean it wasn't technically his fault”, Kirishima said with a smile that slowly went away as he saw the raging aura surrounding Bakugou,”or not…”

The two continued to walk and Kirishima kept checking to see if his murderous aura was gone which...wasn’t. “Uh, hey, Bakugou, wanna hear a joke?”, Kirishima asked. “Does it involve Deku’s death?”, Bakugou answered with a killer smirk on his face. “Ehhh,,,no? hey wait arent you supposed to be a detective wheres the justice here?”

Justice? The justice was his death. Had it not been for Deku he wouldn’t have met Kirishima.Hadit not been for Deku he wouldn’t be feeling these unknown warm feelings that were throughout his body.Hadit not been for Deku, he could have lived his life in control of his own damn heart.Hadit not been for Deku, he wouldnt be here walking with nerd number two to a pizza place. But because of Deku, all of the above was happening.

“Im not a detective yet.”, Bakugou blankly stated. Kirishima sighed,hopefully his mood would be gone when they made it to the pizza place. As he thought to himself, he smiled and glanced at Bakugou who was probably grumbling murderous things to himself. “Pfft”,Kirishima covered his mouth as he laughed a bit. Bakugou stopped and glared,”what?”

“oh nothing, I was just thinking, once your focused on something, youre focused, its kind of admiring, I mean thats what detectives need right? Focus to do their job and solve the case quickly, you really would be a great detective”, Kirishima smiled, showing his somewhat pointy teeth, his eyes smiling.

Bakugou was caught offguard and glanced away with a blush,”dont fucking do that” “eh? Do what?”, Kirishima asked. “That idiotic smile, I hate it, its annoying”, Bakugou answered. This only caused Kirishima to smile more and let out a laugh,”Really? Youre funny, hey, you smile” “over your dead body”, Bakugou growled. Kirishima laughed and  looked away,”guess we’ll save that for another time.”
Without even realizing it, the mood had changed for the two of them, bickering back and forth, until they finally reached the pizza shop.

As soon as they walked in Kirishima heard a voice,”Kiri, Bakugou, over here!”, he heard Mina say. Oh no. Mina. As he looked it wasn’t only her but the rest of the squad. Kirishima looked at Bakugou who walked forward towards them, a not so pleasant look on his face.God please let this go well.

Bakugou was about to say “and who the hell are you” but Kirishima spoke even before he could. “So what are you guys doing here?”, Kirishima fake smiled, secretly wanting to hit all of them. Kaminari spoke,”we just happened to be here” “oh really? At the same time im here?”, Kirishima questioned. Testu, who had his arms around Kami’s shoulder spoke,”yea, a coincidence.”

Kirishima started to grind his teeth,”then how come ALL of you are wearing dark sunglasses?” Mina stood up and pointed,”we wanted to see this all famed Bakugou so stop keeping the blonde hunk to yourself you mangrabber!” Sero raised his fist,”yea tell him Mina-wait minus the hunk part” Kirishima pulled his face down with both hands, trying not to scream in the restaurant,”I was going to introduce you guys LATER” Kirishima heard a bark and looked under the table,”OH really? Really? You gave Sparky sunglasses?” “Hey! hes part of the team too,” Kami said and then cooed,”dont listen to him Sparky”

“Hey! Arent you from the park Bakugou?”, Kaminari asked. Mina gasped,”Kami how could you, you’ve seen him already?” Bakugou was starting to get at his wits end and he rose his voice, maybe a little too loudly,”CAN all of you shutup, I already have to deal with loud shitty hair over here so stop acting like a bunch of kids!”, Bakugou said, breathing a sigh of relief as he got peace and quiet.

They all sat and blinked at Bakugou until Mina spoke,”Kirishima, you have nice eyes lets keep him!”, “Yea!”, everyone at the table agreeing. “HEY Im not your thing pinky!”,Bakugou yelled. Before anyone could say anything else, a loud noise came from Bakugou’s stomach. Shit. He exercised in the morning and completely forgot to eat. “Are you-” “SHUT it”, Bakugou said as he looked away, crossing his arms.

Minutes later Bakugou was reluctantly sitting at their table next to Kirishima eating his pizza. “I guess, I should introduce people?”, Kirishima asked. However, they did that themselves. Mina went first,”Hi, Im Mina”, she said and put out her hands. Bakugou glared at it. “Mina, Bakugou doesnt do hands so..”,Kirishima said. It shouldn’t feel like but it felt like Bakugou was the father and he was introducing his boyfriends and girlfriend.”anyway, as you noted, I do indeed have pink hair, a trademark of mine, I hope we’ll be great friends”

“I dont”, Bakugou said and took another bite of his pizza. Mina laughed,”and hes funny, Kiri, youre amazing” Bakugou was dying in his head. Basically hes hanging with a group of Kirishima’s. Did life hate him that much?

“You know me but Im Kaminari, Kami for short and I’ll just introduce my boyfriend, this is Tetsu” Testu lifted up his hand with a smile,”Nice to meet you bro” Kami continued. “and you know Sparky already”,Sparky barking right after.

“Annnd Im Sero, Kiri’s roomate he never shuts up about you I think he mmfmfmf”,before he could finish, Kirishima covered his mouth,”and thats all my friends, haha.” Oh god. Kirishima was nervous and by the looks of Bakugou’s face, it didnt look too good.

Bakugou moved his hand to grab another piece of pizza and then stood up,”Im leaving, goodbye.” Bakugou said and walked out. That was way too much for him to handle. That was social interaction he would do in a month, but inoneday. His tolerance meter was not that high for what he had to hear at that table.

“Bakugou!”, he heard a familiar voice and turned around to see Kirishima panting, his hand on his knees. Bakugou turned around and glared at him,”the hell do you want now?” Kirishima controlled his breath and looked up,”um,sorry back there, my friends are kind of…”

“loud, annoying, weird”, Bakugou answered for him. “Yea..b-but I promise theyre all nice people but that was unexpected a-and I hope you dont mind it, I mean-, well, uh, I scolded them, I dont know why im so nervous right now haha but”,Kirishima stared at him and spoke quickly because of his,”I think youre really cool and I know you’ll like my friends so give us a chance please?”

Bakugou screamed in his mind. Who gave him the right to look at Bakugou like a dejected puppy that doesn’t want its owner to leave the house? It made him angry. He wanted to say no then and there but thoseeyesthat looked at Bakugou like he would be lost without him. Why did he feel the need to protect them?. Bakugou hated it, but as much as he tried, he couldn’t resist.
Bakugou sighed and turned around,“I hate that face even more.”

“What face?”,Kirishima asked. Bakugou turned his head around,  “ THAT one ,I’d rather see your shitty smile,” Bakugou said. Kirishima laughed,”you got it dude,” he said with a thumbs up.  Bakugou started walking,”I take it back I hate both” Kirishima only smiled more as he stared at Bakugou’s back,”you softie.” Bakugou turned his head,”WHAT was that?” Kirishima laughed as he walked up,”I said wait for me!”
“wait your damn self.”
Kirishima caught up with Bakugou and spoke,”so, you heading home?” “where else would I go?”, Bakugou responded. “Oh where do you live? Dorms?”, Kirishima asked. “Apartments.”
“Which ones?”, Kirishima questioned even further. “Are you trying to stalk me? None of your business”, he answered.

“I guess I’ll just walk you with you till we reach the dorms then, we should hang out sometime this week”, Kirishima said. He put his hands behind his head and looked up the sky. “Whatever”, Bakugou replied. Kirishima smiled. So thats a yes from him.

The two of them walked in silence, neither of them saying anything until Kirishima stopped once they had gone a full two blocks. “I think this is where-wait no, this is definitely where I stop,” Kirishima said. “Do you not even remember where you live?”, Bakugou asked. “Its not that, I just, maybe I wish I didnt live here.” Kirishima crossed his arms and looked away from him in anger, like a little kid who didn’t get what they want.

What was wrong with him?, Bakugou thought as he eyed him. “I cant understand idiot”, Bakugou spit out. “If I didnt live here maybe I could have walked further with you”, Kirishima said, his face turning into a pout for a couple of seconds. He then looked at Bakugou and smiled,”But im sure we’ll hang out lots, right? I guess cause our day kinda got...ruined..”, Kirishima trailed off.

Bakugou clenched his teeth. How could Kirishima’s pouty face look so...damn cute. andwhywas it working on Bakugou.  He didn't have a clue and it was driving him crazy.  Why did his heart clench a little when he saw anything other than a stupid look of happiness on Kirishima’s face? Maybe it was just because he wasn’t used to comforting people? (you like him you, idiot!!) that was probably it.

“Quit your bitching, as long as you dont annoy me….”, Bakugou stopped, unable to say his next words. “As long as I dont annoy you what? We could hang out whenever?”, Kirishima asked with a smile. Bakugou’s face blushed a bit as he looked at him. He pointed at Kirishima,”What did I say about that look asshole!” “pfft, youre weird, are you not used to friends smiling around you or something?”, Kirishima asked.
Bakugou clenched his fist,”well its not like had any in the first place!” Oh fuck. Bakugou realized what he just said, implying that he didn’t have any friends which, he didn’t, but nowheknows.

Kirishima put his hand over his mouth as he looked at Bakugou with beady eyes,”you mean...im..your-” “SHUT IT”, Bakugou said, his cheeks going red. He observed Kirishima and then saw tears threatening his eyes,”Why are you crying idiot?!” Before he could even blink, Kirishima’s hands were wrapped his body. “WHAT. THE . FUCK. get off!”, Bakugou said as he tried to pry Kirishima’s hands from his body.
“Noooo Bakugou, Im so happy, I promise I’ll be the best friend, I’ll never leave you I-OUCH”,Kirishima pulled away and winced as he covered his head with his hands.

“I get it idiot!”, Bakugou yelled and started to let out angry puffs of air as he looked at Kirishima. “Bakugou your face is red aha”,Kirishima said and pointed. “Says the one whose face matches his hair!”, Bakugou answered.

“E-eh? Really? I guess knowing that Im your-”,before Kirishima could speak, Bakugou turned around and stomped off,”Im going home loser.” Kirishima smiled and waved his hand,”Goodbye friend~”, only to receive Bakugou flipping him off as an answer. Stepping stones, thought Kirishima.

Kirishima turned around and placed his hand over his heart, which was still beating. Yea, he may have impulsively hugged Bakugou but he couldn’t get over the fact he couldpracticallyfeelthe toned body he had under there. He turned around to see Bakugou turning the corner and his mouth dropped. Just for a split second...he saw Bakugou smile. He was smiling and Kirishima's heart was being pushed to the edge.He canmake a look like that?and why was his heart beating so furiously? He knew what it might have meant but...he wasn’t too sure. He pulled out his phone.
Kiri: random question, so when did you know you liked Tetsu
Kami: holy shit I knew it you’re gay for him arent you

story_chapters.title: Chapter 9: Epilogue
paragraphs: He was gay for him. Three weeks in and Kirishima could undoubtedly say that he clearly wanted to be more than friends with Bakugou. They had spent more time together. Aka going out to eat pizza and Kirishima crashing at Bakugou’s place so they could play Hero Academia which Bakugou...was really vocal at. Bakugou’s screams and curses were part of the reason Kirishima would always slip up, causing Bakugou to win. However, the real moment he knew what it was, was when he was playing with Bakugou a couple days ago.

“Ah fuck, I forgot to workout”, Bakugou said as he put down the controller. He had won for the third time that night. Kirishima laid back, putting his hands behind his head,”Just do it now, or we could do it together...im kinda out of shape though.” Kirishima didn’t know that this was something he would soon regret...half-regret.
“Get up then loser and stretch”,Bakugou said, already stretching out one arm. Kirishima hoisted himself up the ground and took the same stance as Bakugou. They stretched for about 15 minutes.

“Alright what next?”, Kirishima said. Bakugou had lifted up his skull shirt, taking it off, only to reveal him in a muscle tight tank top. Kirishima’s heart did leaps. Bakugou really was all muscle. Kirishima might as well be a twink next to him. He wondered what was under the shirt and-yep. He was completely gay for him. Kirishima shook his head, trying to get rid of the suggestive thoughts.

“Start with jumping jacks, 50 of them,got it?”, he half-heard Bakugou say as he gawked. Bakugou walked up and snapped his fingers,”I said, got it?” Kirishima shook his head,”A-ah yea, the stretching got to me” “Then get ready for hell”, Bakugou responded.

They started to jump and-oh boy-Kirishima’s eyes just kept staring. Bakugou had paid him no mind because once Bakugou exercised, he was in the zone. Kirishima was half-thankful Bakugou was a such a exercise nut but he also wanted his eyes on him. Oh. There it was again. He wanted Bakugou to look at him..if he didn’t before then, he knew now.

The next set was pushups but Kirishima was already tired, his hands on his knees, talking through huffs of breath,”so you do this”, he took a breath and circled the air with his finger ”everyday huh?” He clutched his rib, it burned.

Bakugou looked at him and chuckled,”I knew you would crumble, I’ll show you how its done.” He took pride in it and he wanted to show it off...but why now? Its not like he goes to the gym everyday to show off his skills, so why was is it so important now? Because..of..he wouldn’t even say the L word, not even in his mind. He cleared his throat.

He continued his workout, Kirishima watched. Once he was finished, he was met with a pair of eyes he almost mistook for stars as they looked as Bakugou,”Bro, are you even human?!, that was amazing, those bad guys will have nothing on you!”
Bakugou blushed,”Kirishima pl-” But he only continued.
“Like they could be Wachow-”, Kirishima did a punch and stepped back.
“Kirishima watch your-”
“And then you just come up and BAM!”, Kirishima did another punch, but he stepped on something causing him to go off balance.

The next thing he knew, he was in Bakugou’s arms, Bakugou’s hand around his waist, their faces close to one another as if they were doing the tango. As soon as they both realized the state they were in, they pulled apart their faces red.

“W-watch where your going next time you clumsy-haired idiot”, Bakugou blurted out. Kirishima nodded, face still red,”I will”, putting on a smile as best as he could, trying to avoid the massive beating of his heart or the fact that he wanted them to kiss.
That day made everything set in stone for Kirishima. Somehow he had convinced to Kirishima to come with him to babysit Eri and Erin.
Kirishima: Hey, you want to come babysit with me?
Bakuguy I love??: Why the hell would I
Kirishima: PLEASE
Bakuguy I love??: I HATE kids.
Kirishima: Bakugou you’re going to have save kids when you’re a detective, you know that right?
Kirishima: youve been silent for five minutes so Im taking that as a yes
Bakuguy I love??: When is it?
Kirishima: Thats the spirit! This Saturday : )
So here he was, walking to Bakugou’s apartment. Bakugou had told him he was in the shower and to walk in.

Kirishima opened the door and spoke,”Bakugouuuu, Im home” “THIS ISNT YOUR HOUSE IDIOT”, he heard Bakugou scream from his room. Kirishima laughed, it was always fun teasing him and besides, it kinda was. He spent more time here than in his own room.

Kirishima walked in and opened Bakugou’s door,”Hey there Baku-ohhhhh” Bakugou had a towel wrapped around his waist and another one in his hands as he dried his hair. Kirishima quickly closed the door and heard a “knock before you enter idiot!” His back was to the door and his hand was too his heart, which was thumping and threatening to jump out of his chest. His face warm and he knew it was really, really red.

He had just gotten a glimpse at how Bakugou looked under his his shirt. Was it humanly possible for a human to be that ripped? Just how much did he work out everyday? Is he even real? Kirishima’s head kept bouncing off with a bunch of thoughts that veryquicklyturned suggestive. He had the strongest urge to touch it.

Bakugou was more of the less the same. They were both boys, so why did he yell and get embarrassed. And they were friends. That should be nothing, right? Yet, here he was, heart running at a mile per second.

Bakugou took a couple breaths and spoke,”you can come in now.”  Seconds later the door opened and Kirishima smiled,”are you ready to go babysit some kids?” Bakugou rolled his eyes,”yea im sure it’ll be loads of fun”, he said sarcastically. “Oh when did you have such a change of heart?”, Kirishima asked. Bakugou glared,”I said that sarcastically and you know it”
“I know, teasing teasing, thats what friends do”, Kirishima laughed as he waved it off.

“KIWIIIII”,Both of the twins screamed as they ran up to them. “Eri, Erin, did you guys miss me?”, He smiled wide and picked both of them up with his arms. Bakugou had his arms crossed, eyeing their interaction. It was kind of cute, fuck. He turned his head away, a blush apparent on his face.

“Whos the spiky boy?”,Erin asked. Kirishima put them down and they both stared at Bakugou in amazement, their mouths agape. Bakugou looked at them and he the little girl ran and hid behind Kirishima’s leg,”Kiwi, he scawieee” Bakugou felt offended and glared at the little girl, causing her to screech.

Kirishima put his hand on Eri’s head,”Its fine, Bakugou is my friend, and hes good, right Bakugou?”, he looked at Bakugou for confirmation. “I...guess?”,Bakugou questioned. Not the best answer he could have said but Kirishima took it,”see! He wont hurt you, go shake his hand” “Wait no-”, Bakugou started but stopped as the little girl walked in front of him.

Bakugou sighed and bent down, holding out his hand. He grabbed Eri’s and shook it, doing his best to force a smile. Kirishima didn’t miss the chance and he took it a picture, practically laughing as he shook the twins hands. They ran off into the living room.

Kirishima had his hands on his cheeks, eyes sparkling, looking at Bakugou,”and you said you hated kids” Bakugou looked and his heart skipped a beat, rarely used to seeing Kirishima that happy. He curled his hand up into a fist and hit Kirishima’s head,”cut the gawking idiot.”

“Kiwi come play with us!”, He head Eri yell. “Coming~”, Kirishima sang out. Bakugou rolled his eyes as he followed behind the red head into the living room. A bunch of toys were already scattered around the floor.
“What do you guys want to play today?”, Kirishima asked.
“Hmmmmmm”, they both said for a couple seconds until Eri lifted up her hands and said,”prince and princess!”

Eri hugged Kirishima and looked up at him,”will you be my pwince?” Kirishima picked her up and lifted her up into the air,”anything for my princess” She giggled and Erin spoke,”then I’ll be the bad guy!”

Bakugou was biting his lip. Okay. Maybe seeing Kirishima act with kids and take on that soft, baby voice any normal person naturally does around children was a bit to cute...oralot. Just ignore it, he told himself, he could definitely survive the next five hours.
Kirishima was now holding Eri and she pointed at Bakugou,”what about baku?” Bakugou furrowed his brows,”oh no, I’ll just watch im not-”
“He could be the dragon!”, Erin suggested.
“You wanna be the dragon, right Bakugou?”, Kirishima asked, a smile on his face. Bakugou slapped his hands over his face,”I guess I have no choice”How the hell could I say not to that face?
Five minutes later, Bakugou was on all fours and their little play had begun.
“Once upon a time there was a handsome prince named Kiri and he had to save Princess Eri from the evil villain, me, Erin, and fight a blond mean dragon”, Erin ended as he pointed as Bakugou.

“Princess Eri, I’ll save you!”, he said as he lifted up his fake sword. He started to fake play like he was fighting monsters till he finally arrived at Bakugou and pointed his sword,”Monster, you stand in the way of me, prepare to be defeated.”
“Bwakugou, you have to roar, dragons roar!”, Eri commented from the sidelines.
Oh God. Bakugou put his head down and closed his eyes. Just once. Just Once.

He lifted his head up and opened his mouth wide,”ROARRRRR” Kirishima pretended to flinch,”ouch! His fire is hard, but my spirit, is harder, AHHHHH” He moved the sword down and bonked Bakugou in the head. “Go die you evil dragon!”
Bakugou spoke,”oh no, you’ve defeated me, bleh”, he laid down on the floor and closed his eyes. Kirishima had to close his mouth and stifle a laugh.Bleh? Really Bakugou?
Kirishima stomped over to Erin,”Duel me for the princess” Erin revealed his own sword,”I’ll take you down and the princess shall be mine!”
“You can do it kiwi!”, Eri shouted, pretending to be tied up.
At this point, Bakugou was sitting criss-crossed, his arm on his knees and hand on his cheek, watching the end of it.
The two dueled it out until Kirishima stabbed him in the heart and Erin was defeated, dying as dramatically as he possibly could.
“Princess! I’ll untie you.”, Kirishima said and went over to her. He rushed over and pretended to untie Eri, scooping her into his arms. Eri giggled and she kissed his cheek,”Thank you Kiwi”
Kirishima smiled, showing his teeth,”Anything for you.”
Tch. Lucky Girl-Wait am I Jea-No no no.Bakugou’s eyes went wide as he realized what he just thought.
“Okay, what next guys?”, Kirishima asked. “Horsey!”, Eri said. “One horse coming right up”, Kirishima said as he got on all fours.
Erin looked at Bakugou,”be my horse”, he said. Bakugou sighed….as if the day couldn’t get any more humilitianing. Regardless, he couldn’t say no, and got on all fours.

“Giddy up horsey!”, Eri said as she kicked her legs.Kirishima made a fake horse noise and Bakugou let out a “pfft”, because he sounded absolutely ridiculous. He watched Kirishima start to walk and he followed after. “Hang on kid”, he said a he started to walk.

They traveled around the house until the two of them got tired. “Are you guys hungry? I could make some snacks”, Kirishima suggested, hoping their hunger would end it. Luckily, they both agreed that they were hungry.
He told the kids to go wait in the living room and turned on the television for them to watch TV as they prepared sandwiches and chips for the kids.

“Theyre cute right? Im the youngest so it’s like they’re my younger siblings”, Kirishima talked as he put mayonnaise on the bread. “I guess”, responded Bakugou. Bakugou kept stealing glances as Kirishima kept talking about the twins. He only ever got this excited when he talked about rocks and Bakugou could barely handle it. Because, when he was talking about something he was passionate, that was when he shined the most,

It was almost blinding, the way he would talk about things. Even if it was about rocks, Kirishima could make it seem like the most interesting thing in the world. He looked down and continued to make the sandwich as blush spread across his cheeks. He kept trying to avoid it but...the beating in his heart...maybe it was L...L...L-

“Bakugou!”, He heard Kirishima. Bakugou snapped out of it and held up his knife,”What?” Kirishima laughed,”dont kill me, but you finished?” “O-oh, yea”, Bakugou put his knife down and stuck the sandwiches together.

They walked in and they gave the twins their food. The both of them sat down at a small table and ate it. Bakugou and Kirishima retreated to the couch as their eyes focused on the episode of spongebob that was playing.
Ten minutes later, Eri called out to Kirishima,”Kiwi, im finished!” Kirishima moved his eyes towards her and smiled,”you ate it all?”, he asked. She nodded her head and held up her plate,”look!”
Kirishima clapped his hands,”good, you both have to eat if you want to grow big like me and Bakugou, Hey, you know Bakugou is really strong?”
Bakugou raised one brow, just what was he up to.

“Yea, he could hold the both of you with one arm, I bet”, Kirishima said and their eyes sparkled. Bakugou slowly started to accept that this is how the rest of the day would go and stood up, holding out his hands.

Seconds later, each twin was hanging and dangling from Bakugou’s arms. Eri giggled,”Bwaku move us” “You guys think im some ride at the playground?”, Bakugou questioned. “Yep!”,Erin responded. He sighed and started moving his arms up and down. They weren’t heavy butstillhe now had Kirishima laughing at him.
The rest of the day, the kids decided to do more and more things to get rid of their energy, hide and seek, tag, ring-a-around the rosie. And finally, much to Bakugou’s relief, they got tired.
Bakugou had was carrying Erin as he fell asleep, his head on Bakugou’s shoulders. Kirishima was doing the same with Eri as the twins fell asleep.

They walked in and set them on their beds, then going back into the living and settling in on the couch. “I’m so tireddddd”, Kirishima whined and he moved his body so that his head was now on Bakugou’s laps. Bakugou was about to tell him to get off till he saw the slow rising of his chest.
Did he just fall asleep?

Bakugou grumbled but he couldn’t do anything because he wouldn’t dare wake him up now he looked...soft. He just decided to watch over him. Bakugou stared at him for a couple of minutes until his eyes started to get droopy and he fell asleep.
“That was fun, wasn’t it?”, Kirishima asked. The twin’s mother came home shortly after they fell asleep and now they were back at Bakugou’s apartment.

“Maybe”, responded Bakugou as he went to get a cup of water. Kirishima’s mouth went wide,”you actually enjoyed it didn’t you?” Bakugou almost choked on the water and spoke,”I hated it lesser than I expected to, thats all.”

“You loved it, you loved it, you loved it,”,Kirishima started to gleefully celebrate. “Hey, already took care of enough kids today, quit it”, Bakugou said. He didn’t like being wrong but its not like he couldn’t disagree with Kirishima’s statement.
Kirishima stopped and went back to leaning on the counter,”Im happy we’re friends now you know?”
“No, I dont”, Bakugou answered. Which he would soon regret saying.

Kirishima opened his mouth,”You know we spend a lot of time together right? But its fun hanging out with you and I enjoy it, it always makes my day, even if its just over text, and teasing you is funny as well, youre, youre one of my bestfriends now and its great...”

Bakugou’s mouth dropped open as he stared at Kirishima’s face, eyeing each and every expression and there was no doubt about it. He was talking about Bakugou the same way he talked about the twins or his stupid rocks, but all those words were being directed towards him.
Love.
His heart was beating and there was no dying that feeling that he had been avoiding, trying to not put a name to it, because if he did, then it became real.

“So thank you for being my friend Bakugou”, Bakugou heard the last of his conversation. “Bakugou, are you okay? Your face is super red”, Kirishima walked and he put his hand to his forehead,”youre not getting a-”
Bakugou flinched and swatted his hand. Too close. Too close.
“Are you okay?”, Kirishima asked.
No. He wasn’t okay and it was all because of him.

“Just..stay back for a minute”,Bakugou said. Kirishima was confused and he walked towards Bakugou. Bakugou covered his mouth with his hands and kept taking a step back until he hit a wall. “I said...stay back.”He said again.
Kirishima only pursued further and he grabbed Bakugou’s wrists, pulling his hands away from his face,”Just what has gotten into you?”
“You shit-brained idiot, don’t blame me for what happens next”, Bakugou said, his head turn.

Before Kirishima could respond, Bakugou had taken his wrists and pulled Kirishima into a kiss. His heart was beating so fast he thought he might faint but he the sweet touch of Kirishima’s lips on his made him not want to pull away...until he felt something wet.
He pulled away.
“Are you crying?!”,Bakugou said as he looked Kirishima's, clearly tear stained face but...he was smiling.

“Im happy”, Kirishima said. Bakugou had his hands up in the air, not knowing what to do,”then why are you crying?” This made Kirishima let out a small laugh as he wiped his face,”people cry when they’re happy...especially when the person they like kisses them.”
Bakugou felt a sudden jolt go through his brain and his face went red again. “Thats your fault.” He said, turning his eyes away from him.
Kirishima moved closer to him and wrapped his hands around Bakugou’s waist,”I love you too”, Burying his face in his shoulder.
Bakugou was weak. He would be angry and try to move him away like he always did when Kirishima randomly hugged him but, no, this time he was weak and...he actually wanted it.
“I hate you.”
“No, you love me, Bakugou”, Kirishima said, only hugging him tighter.
He was right. He was right but there was no chance in hell he could say it now.

Bakugou slowly moved his arms and wrapped them around Kirishima. “I can’t believe the mighty Bakugou has fallen in love”, Kirishima teased. “I’ll kick you out right now”, bakugou threatened. “All bark no bite-oUCH”, Kirishima pulled away and glared,”did you just bite my shoulder?”

“No bite huh? Think again”, Bakugou said with a smirk. Kirishima blushed,“Bakugou I didn’t know you wanted to move that quickly-” “Im leaving”, he said as he walked off towards his room. Kirishima laughed,”wait, hey lets take a pic to commemorate”, he said.
“No”, Bakugou stomped off. Kirishima put an evil smirk on his face, went up, kissed Bakugou on the cheek, and clicked the camera button.
“You little shit.”

story_chapters.title: Chapter 10: Coffee
paragraphs: Bakugou was at work again today and Kirishima was coming soon once he got word that his favorite person that made coffee was there. He had intended to keep it secret for a while longer but hearing the person you love idolize someone who, even if it was him, he had no idea and it made him...for a lack of better words, jealous. Essentially, Kirishima was talking about someone he hadn’t even metdespitethe person being in front of his eyes everyday.

He did tell Kirishima he worked at a coffee shop but he refused to tell him which one because it would only lead him closer to his secret and he didn’t need distractions while he work. Kirishima saying “If I knew where you worked I’d probably do my work there-Ouch!” and Bakugou hitting his fist on his head as he muttered with a blush,”as if I’d need distractions idiot.”
However, his jealous ways were getting to him and today was his breaking point.
Kirishima: His coffee is the only thing that gets me up every morning
Bakugou: wow...not like its the 348th time you’ve said that
Kirishima: what...you jealous??
Bakugou: why would I be?
Kirishima: hmm hmmm
Kirishima: whatever you say….what did the geologist villain say when he got caught by the scooby doo gang?
Bakugou: its too early...please.
Kirishima: And I would have gotten away with it if it wasnt for you PEBBLING kids!
Bakugou: when will you run out of jokes for the love of god
Kirishima: geology is always on my mind

Bakugou rolled his eyes and put his phone back in his pocket. What an idiot. How many jokes could he possibly have?? He had to run out right??  He sighed as he started to prepare coffee for the next person.
Ten minutes had passed until he got an order from Midoriya,”Order for Kirishima!”
Bakugou smirked. Now was his time. He couldn’t wait to revel in the glory he would receive from Kirishima knowing that it was him all along.

He prepared the coffee and he the cup on his hands as he got ready to write the words on table. Thinking about it for a couple of seconds, Bakugou put the marker on the cup and wrote the words he was thinking down. When he walked out, even Midoriya was surprised, but he said nothing. Bakugou couldn’t tell if it was out of pure shock or that he knew what was going to happen.
Kirishima was on his phone, oblivious to anything else around him. Bakugou walked to him and set down his cup,”heres your order.”

“Thanks bro”, Kirishima said as he moved his hand, eyes still on his phone, picking up the cup till something clicked. That wasn’t Midoriya. He set down his phone and his eyes widened as he sawthe person in front of him. He slowly set down back his coffee as he tried to formulate a sentence,”you? The-uh, coffee-”, his hand kept pointing between Bakugou and the coffee before Bakugou decided to speak  for him.
“Yes, I was the person that always made your coffee, I work here.”, he said, arms crossed.

Kirishima finally opened his mouth,”IT WAS YOU?”, and pointed at Bakugou. Bakugou’s eyes went wide and he placed his hands down,”hey, could you be any louder?” “well YEA YOURE-mfdjf”, Bakugou moved forward and placed his hands over his mouth.
He whispered as his eyes centered on Kirishima’s,”listen to me closely, take the coffee, read whats on the cup, and go to class, okay?” Kirishima nodded and Bakugou slowly backed away as he eyed him.

Kirishima picked up the coffee and quickly flipped the cup. He read the words,”I get off at one.” As he opened the door to leave, he turned his head back and saw Bakugou staring. Kirishima smiled and waved at him. He saw Bakugou freeze as he did and he turned, which was probably because he was blushing. Kirishima was way too used to it, and waved back at Kirishima as he left his sight of view.

Kirishima walked to the nearest bench and set everything down as he talked to himself,”I cant believe Bakugou was the same person all along oh my rocks”,he stayed quiet for a second and then continued to talk,”this is fate! But why didn’t he tell me-but then again this is Bakugou we’re talking about but STILL we’re d-d-d…” Kirishima went silent as his face went red. Yes, they had only been dating for a week but...it wasn’t like much changed. Or maybe that was the point. Or was it?

Kirishima shook his head. He was overthinking it too much. “I get off at one” he repeated in his head. It must mean that he wanted him to come there, of course. They were probably just going to head straight to Bakugou’s house….but he hadn’t been there sincethattime.

Regardless of the countless thoughts that were floating through his mind, Kirishima couldn’t help but smile at the fact that Bakugou was the person that made his favorite coffee. As if he couldn’t love him more. Kirishima picked up the coffee and took a sip. His coffee tasted great and it was weird, but he somehow felt that, now, this coffee was made specially for him. It always has been, but knowing that it was Bakugou, it tasted like the coffee was made of love.

Kirishima was basking in loving thoughts until his mind clicked and he checked his watch. Shit. It was five minutes till class. He got up and started to walk as fast as he could with a coffee in his hand. This is what he gets for having Bakugou on his mind. Its been more frequent lately, as if he didn’t think about Bakugou alot before,but now it was even worse.
All he could think about was the kiss.

Bakugou walked inside and put his hand on his heart. That was a close one. He didn’t know why it was so hard to invite Kirishima over..especially sincethattime. Even when Kirishima left that night, his heart wouldn’t stop beating for nearly an hour. His mind controlled his body, it all happened too fast and now they were….he couldn’t say the word. Bakugou shook his head and slapped his cheeks. He didn’t have time to be thinking about that idiot.
But he did.
It was never this bad, but he had messed up on two orders. Accidentally putting the wrong names and catching the two as they went out to tell them what he had done. Luckily, they were nice about it.

After his shift ended, he was grateful as he could ever be. When he walked out, he saw Kirishima sitting on a nearby table. He waved and smiled,”Bakugouuuuu, over here!”  “I can see that idiot!”, Bakugou shouted back.
Bakugou walked over, his hands in his pocket and looked at him,”come on.” He turned around and Kirishima only smiled as he stood up and followed behind Bakugou.

The two walked in a silence for about about a block until Bakugou was crashing under pressure. It was never this quiet. Kirishima was usually talkative, saying a dumb joke, or asking Bakugou questions, so why was he so quiet now?

Bakugou glanced over and his eyes locked with Kirishima, only for him to look away from Bakugou as soon as he did and...was his face red? Bakugou looked in front of him as his heart rate started to speed up.
Keep it calm and cool Bakugou.
“Kiri-”
“AHHH,o-oh, yea”

Before Bakugou could say anything, Kirishima got spooked just by the sound of his voice next to his ear. Nice one Kirishima. He didn’t know what had gotten into him but all he could think about was going back to Bakugou’s place and what would happen. Would they kiss again? How could such a simple label on a person’s relationship change it that much when they were completely fine before.

He saw Bakugou squint his eyes at him and then turned his head as he continued to walk. Was he not going to say anything about the outburst? Kirishima was kind of glad he didn’t but what was Bakugou thinking?
Ten painstakingly minutes later, they had arrived at Bakugou’s house.
Kirishima walked in, took off his shoes, and started to look around his house like he it was his first time visiting.

“Would you like some water?”,he heard Bakugou say. He turned to him and Kirishima shook his head in agreement slowly. Bakugou kicked off his shoes and headed towards the kitchen, Kirishima following right after him.

He sat down at the table and watched as Bakugou took two cups and filled it with water. Bakugou looked up and spoke,”are you gonna quit staring at me?” Kirishima flinched and put his hands in the air,”uh,well..” he directed his eyes away from Bakugou as he tried to find the words.
Bakugou sighed and walked over with the two glasses, setting them down on the table and sitting across from Kirishima. He slid one to Kirishima and closed his eyes as he spoke.
“Im not very good at this thing”,he heard Bakugou say and Kirishima looked up. Bakugou had his head down, both of his hands grasping the cup.
Ah.

Bakugou was probably just as nervous as he was. His heart was probably beating just as fast as his would now. He thought Bakugou was much more calmer than he was….but maybe he was faking it after all.
Suddenly, a wave of relief seemed to wash over Kirishima’s body.

He smiled and he looked at Bakugou as he spoke,”Im really happy you were the one who made my coffee.” Bakugou looked up at him, his eyebrows scrunching in confusion,”what?” Kirishima laughed nervously,”I mean, its fate, isn’t it? That the person who made the coffee I liked the most hes my boyfriend now.” Seconds later Kirishima was bonked on the head by Bakugou.Dont say that so easily!”

Kirishima held his head as he fake cried,”but its true. You know it took everything in me to just say that right? This whole week I’ve been nervous and all I keep thinking is..well...Us...and the fact we’re..dating..havent you?”
Bakugou’s face went beet red as he sat at the table and looked away from Kirishima. He crossed his arms and spoke,”w-well yea..”’

Kirishima looked as he saw Bakugou go red and sighed. Why was he so nervous in the first place when Bakugou was sitting in front of him like this? It was kind of...cute. Its rare to see Bakugou at a loss of words. Kirishima stood up and picked up his chair, moving it over in front of Bakugou’s eyesight and setting it down.

He sat down and spoke,”you know Bakugou, you can be cute sometimes.” Bakugou grit his teeth,”Dont call me cute.” Kirishima held his stomach and laughed. “You know Bakugou, out of all the people I know, you reallyrockmy world.”

Bakugou stood up and turned around. “Get out of my house with your lame jokes.” He started to walk away but Kirishima smiled and hugged him from behind,”youre bluffing~” Bakugou locked his hands on Kirishima’s elbows and tried to get him off,”Im not! Kirishima was shocked for a second,his pupils dilating as he stared into Bakugou’s, closing his eyes to take it in. Bakugou’s hand were holding his cheeks gently and the kiss was so...blissful. He felt safe and he wouldn’t want to be anywhere else in the world right now.

To tell the truth, Bakugou was going to hit him. but he stopped, releasing his fist. and his hand fell naturally on his head. For some reason, all he wanted to do in this moment and take it, holding Kirishima close to him. He may have been a bit too embarrassed to still say the four letter word, but he hoped, through his actions, Kirishima at least knew that much.

Bakugou did something unexpected again and Kirishima’s heart started to race yet again. He smiled, gripping Bakugou’s shirt more and moving his face closer to Bakugou’s neck. Kirishima could tell from the way Bakugou was acting. He didn't need to say it but heknew.The feeling was great and he never wanted to leave.
